description: Lecture discussing pricing strategies with an unknown distribution of buyer willingness to pay. It explores the trade-offs in setting a price for a good or service, considering the probability of sale and revenue per sale.
topic_summary: The lecture focuses on a pricing problem where the seller must determine an optimal price P without knowing the buyer's willingness to pay V. It discusses the implications of setting price higher or lower and the relationship between price, probability of sale, and revenue [t=1:12].
